'''Vuoles''' were small lizards, approximately the size of a Human hand, that could be found throughout the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]], thriving in all kinds of terrain. They possessed two small protrusions below the mouth, and one beside each eye; the ones beside the eyes met above the head and merged into a crest approximately an inch high.

Described as "curious," vuoles were one of the culinary staples of the [[Sharu/Legends|Toka]] (whether they continued to be so after the Toka's reemergence as the [[Sharu/Legends|Sharu]] is unknown). They were usually spit-roasted over an open fire, then peeled off the stick and eaten by hand. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] was nearly sick to his stomach upon seeing his Toka companion [[Mohs]] consume one this way.
